cases.description: 5 things I wish I knew before Amazon interview

post.text: 5 things I wish I knew before my Senior Engineer interview at Amazon. Thread: 1. Leadership Principles matter as much as the code. 2. Think out loud — silence is a red flag. 3. Clarify requirements before diving in. 4. Ask about edge cases yourself. 5. Be specific about your past impact.

cases.description: Recruiter tip — resume advice

post.text: Recruiter tip: always tailor your resume for each application. Generic resumes get filtered out instantly. Here is a simple framework that takes under 10 minutes and actually works. Save this post.
